mainEntity.name: Can my employer fire me for filing a chemical exposure claim in Sandy, Utah?
mainEntity.text: Can my employer fire me for filing a chemical exposure claim in Sandy, Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: No, Utah law prohibits retaliation for workers' comp filings, including chemical exposure claims; violations allow wrongful termination suits.

suggestedAnswer.text: Utah Code § 34A-2-114 bans discharge or discrimination for claiming benefits. In Sandy, document harassment or demotion post-filing. File retaliation claim within 180 days. Insurers/employers pressure quits—retain rights to full benefits. Local attorneys pursue punitive damages if proven.

name: Retaliation Protections for Chemical Exposure Claims in Sandy
description: No, Utah law prohibits retaliation for workers' comp filings, including chemical exposure claims; violations allow wrongful termination suits.
